---
pagetitle: "Emory Economics PhD Workshop"
details: " "
page-layout: custom
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

<style>
.content-block {
  padding-top: 20px;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
  margin-left: 30px;
  margin-right: 30px;
}

@media(min-width: 900px) {
  .content-block {
    margin-left: 50px;
    margin-right: 50px;
  }
}

@media(min-width: 1200px) {
  .content-block {
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
}
</style>


::: {.content-block}

# Professionalism Workshop

::: {.text-secondary .fs-4}

Working through the "unwritten" aspects of preparing for and navigating the job market for economics PhD students


Department of Economics<br>
Emory University<br>
**Follow us!** [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/company/emory-university-department-of-economics), [{{< fa brands facebook >}}](https://www.facebook.com/EmoryEcon/), and [{{< fa brands instagram >}}](https://www.instagram.com/econemory/)

:::

---


::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}


## Facilitator

{{< fa user >}} [Ian McCarthy](https://www.ianmccarthyecon.com)<br>
{{< fa university >}} R. Rollins, R418<br>
{{< fa envelope >}} [ian.mccarthy@emory.edu](mailto:ian.mccarthy@emory.edu)<br>

:::

::: {.g-col-6}

## Workshop Modules

All slide decks are hosted on the [content site](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/).

:::

:::

---

## Professional Etiquette

- [Staying Organized](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/etiquette/organization.html)
- [Emails](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/etiquette/emails.html)
- [Meetings](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/etiquette/meetings.html)
- [Culture](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/etiquette/culture.html)

## 1st Year: Just starting the program

- [Who is here and who might leave?](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year1/why-leave.html)
- [Tips for sticking around](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year1/how-to-finish.html)

## 2nd Year: From student to researcher

- [Tips for generating research ideas](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year2/ideas.html)
- [From idea to paper](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year2/moving-forward.html)

## 3rd Year: Best practices in research

**Basic Workflow**

- [Get Organized](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year3/organize.html)
- [Keep Track](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year3/tracking.html)
- [Backups](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year3/backup.html)

**Learning "How to Write"**

- [Get Started](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year3/start-writing.html)
- [Writing Better](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year3/write-better.html)

## 4th Year: Preparing for the market

- [Understanding the Job Market](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year4/the-market.html)
- [Preparing your Materials](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year4/market-materials.html)
- [Conferences and Presentations](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year4/present.html)
- [Publishing](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year4/publish.html)
- [Summarizing your Work](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year4/summarize.html)
- [Your Website](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year4/website.html)

## 5th Year: Finishing up

- [Preparing for the Defense](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year5/defense.html)
- [Post-defense Transitions](https://imccart.github.io/phd-workshop-content/year5/wrap-up.html)

:::
